allow: Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); console.log\(''MONGODB_URI:'', process.env.MONGODB_URI ? ''SET'' : ''NOT SET''\); console.log\(''PORT:'', process.env.PORT\);")

Bash(bun -e "import path from ''path''; import { fileURLToPath } from ''url''; const __filename = fileURLToPath\(import.meta.url\); const __dirname = path.dirname\(__filename\); console.log\(''__dirname:'', __dirname\); console.log\(''env path:'', path.join\(__dirname, ''..'', ''.env''\)\);")
